title: kickxia brunneri
intro: Kickxia brunneri, also known as Brunner's kidney vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anthelmintic and antispasmodic effects, which help to expel intestinal worms and alleviate muscle spasms. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, likely due to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Herbal preparations of Kickxia brunneri, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, are used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and menstrual issues.
